//: Lint-only type-check config. Widens rootDir to the repo root so `tsc --noEmit` can resolve the permitted src/ -> hooks/ import in src/lib/write-safety.ts (the #50 single-source seam) without TS6059. Kept SEPARATE from tsconfig.json so the npm build (tsup --dts, which reads tsconfig.json) keeps its narrow src/-only declaration scope and stays fast — widening the shared rootDir slowed the --dts emit enough to time out the build-in-hook test on slower CI.
